creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler
Date: Sun Apr 29 22:28:15 2012
New Revision: 234821
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/234821

Log:
  Add support for:
  	Olympus FE-210 camera
  	LG UP3S MP3 player
  	Laser MP3-2GA13 MP3
  
  PR:		usb/119201
  Submitted by:	Peter Jeremy <peterjeremy@optushome.com.au>
  Approved by:	cperciva
  MFC after:	1 week

Modified:
  head/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c

Modified: head/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c
==============================================================================
--- head/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c	Sun Apr 29 22:23:00 2012	(r234820)
+++ head/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_da.c	Sun Apr 29 22:28:15 2012	(r234821)
@@ -811,6 +811,27 @@ static struct da_quirk_entry da_quirk_ta
 		{ T_DIRECT, SIP_MEDIA_FIXED, "WDC WD??", "???PVT*", "*" },
 		/*quirks*/DA_Q_4K
 	},
+	{
+		/*
+		 * Olympus FE-210 camera
+		 */
+		{T_DIRECT, SIP_MEDIA_REMOVABLE, "OLYMPUS", "FE210*",
+		"*"}, /*quirks*/ DA_Q_NO_SYNC_CACHE
+	},
+	{
+		/*
+		 * LG UP3S MP3 player
+		 */
+		{T_DIRECT, SIP_MEDIA_REMOVABLE, "LG", "UP3S",
+		"*"}, /*quirks*/ DA_Q_NO_SYNC_CACHE
+	},
+	{
+		/*
+		 * Laser MP3-2GA13 MP3 player
+		 */
+		{T_DIRECT, SIP_MEDIA_REMOVABLE, "USB 2.0", "(HS) Flash Disk",
+		"*"}, /*quirks*/ DA_Q_NO_SYNC_CACHE
+	},
 };
 
 static	disk_strategy_t	dastrategy;
